title: onobrychis pumila
intro: Onobrychis pumila, also known as dwarf clover or small bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Onobrychis pumila include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Onobrychis pumila is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
